category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Turkey EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入土耳其：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入土耳其：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Turkey CE-marking expectations, TSE / TS EN IEC 61851 technical alignment, EPDK charging-service licensing, TEDAS grid project approval, connector compatibility, OCPP, and safety / EMC evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与土耳其 CE 标志要求、TSE / TS EN IEC 61851 技术对应、EPDK 充电服务许可、TEDAŞ 电网项目审批、连接器兼容性、OCPP 以及安全/EMC证据的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與土耳其 CE 標誌要求、TSE / TS EN IEC 61851 技術對應、EPDK 充電服務許可、TEDAŞ 電網項目審批、連接器相容性、OCPP 以及安全/EMC證據的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CE scope determination, TSE standards interpretation, EPDK licensing assessment, TEDAS grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charging-network operators, and installers should verify current Turkish CE, TSE, EPDK, TEDAS, electrical-installation, data, payment, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, installation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CE适用范围裁定、TSE标准解释、EPDK许可评审、TEDAŞ并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电网络运营方和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前，应与合格专业人士核实现行土耳其CE、TSE、EPDK、TEDAŞ、电气安装、数据、支付及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CE適用範圍裁定、TSE標準解釋、EPDK許可評審、TEDAŞ併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電網路營運方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或營運前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行土耳其CE、TSE、EPDK、TEDAŞ、電氣安裝、資料、支付及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Turkey, the main practical gaps are CE technical-file and declaration work for applicable EU-aligned product legislation, TSE / TS EN IEC 61851 technical alignment, GB/T-to-IEC Type 2 or CCS2 connector redesign, EPDK charging-network licensing for public charging service operations, TEDAS and distribution-company grid project review, OCPP backend interoperability, and EMC / residual-current protection evidence. A blanket whole-unit mandatory TSE certificate should not be assumed without checking the exact model, voltage, installation route, and use case with Turkish authorities or a qualified local conformity professional.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入土耳其时，主要实际差距包括适用欧盟协调产品法规下的CE技术文件与符合性声明、TSE / TS EN IEC 61851技术对应、GB/T到IEC Type 2或CCS2接口重新设计、公共充电服务运营的EPDK充电网络许可、TEDAŞ及配电公司电网项目审查、OCPP后台互操作，以及EMC/剩余电流保护证据。不应在未向土耳其主管机关或合格本地合规专业人士核实具体型号、电压、安装路径和用途前，假定存在统一的整机强制TSE证书。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入土耳其時，主要實際差距包括適用歐盟協調產品法規下的CE技術文件與符合性聲明、TSE / TS EN IEC 61851技術對應、GB/T到IEC Type 2或CCS2接口重新設計、公共充電服務營運的EPDK充電網路許可、TEDAŞ及配電公司電網項目審查、OCPP後台互操作，以及EMC/剩餘電流保護證據。不應在未向土耳其主管機關或合格本地合規專業人士核實具體型號、電壓、安裝路徑和用途前，假定存在統一的整機強制TSE證書。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, grid operator, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
